title: Spatial Cross Models Lite
description: A smaller version of Spatial Cross Models that only changes more specific stuff.
body:
# About the pack
**This pack is a smaller version of the [Spatial Cross Models](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spatial-cross-models) resourcepack, that changes less things and is designed to be used in more day-to-day gameplay.**

Comparison table of features between this pack and the original:

![Feature comparison table. The difference between the packs is that SCM Lite doesn't have Generic crosses and Non-strech crosses.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9c988bc8e075a475448be8fc9984024fa08fedb.png)

_Generic cross - most Cross blocks like Dandelions, Oak Saplings and Dripstone use this one._

_Directional cross - used by blocks that have non-symmetrical textures like Poppies or Pale Oak Saplings._

_Non-stretch cross - used by blocks that have holes in their textures like Grass or the Firefly Bush._

_Other model changes - refers to models used by only specific blocks, like Dripleaf, Cactus or Coral Fans._
